children.text: The term “controlled substance” has the same meaning given such term in .section 802(6) of this title
The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Agriculture.

The term “State” means each of the fifty States, the District of Columbia, the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico, Guam, the Virgin Islands of the United States, American Samoa, the Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands, or the Trust Territory of the Pacific Islands.

children.heading: Persons ineligible for Federal agricultural program benefits
children.label: b Persons ineligible for Federal agricultural program benefits
A
children.text: any price support or payment made available under the Agricultural Act of 1949 ( et seq.), the Commodity Credit Corporation Charter Act ( et seq.), or any other Act;7 U.S.C. 142115 U.S.C. 714

children.label: B
children.text: a farm storage facility loan made under section 4(h) of the Commodity Credit Corporation Charter Act ();15 U.S.C. 714b(h)

children.label: C
children.text: crop insurance under the Federal Crop Insurance Act ( et seq.);7 U.S.C. 1501

children.label: D
children.text: a disaster payment made under the Agricultural Act of 1949 ( et seq.); or7 U.S.C. 1421

children.label: E
children.text: a loan made, insured or guaranteed under the Consolidated Farm and Rural Development Act ( et seq.) or any other provision of law administered by the Farmers Home Administration; or7 U.S.C. 1921

children.label: A
children.text: produced during that crop year, or any of the four succeeding crop years, by such person; and

children.label: B
children.text: acquired by the Commodity Credit Corporation.
govern the determination of persons who shall be ineligible for program benefits under this section; and
protect the interests of tenants and sharecroppers.
